signals.text: Renewal/transition call completed with Kar on Apr 13 - smooth handover to Pulkit and Nidhi as new account managers
Kar agreed to $2,000/month flat month-to-month plan via Stripe - contract continuity secured
90% of Little Saints traffic runs through FERMAT pages with 12 active funnels, expanding to 20
Pulkit sent post-call recap email to Kar on Apr 14 with key takeaways and next steps
Moving from annual contract to month-to-month due to fundraising uncertainty - potential summer churn risk if fundraising fails
Kar volunteered as beta tester for FERMAT MCP and AI module features - high product engagement
FERMAT metrics API authentication unavailable - unable to score platform performance this refresh cycle

recent.title: Little Saints x FERMAT
recent.summary: Renewal/transition call. Kar walked through business context (non-alcoholic spirits, 18 micro-personas, 90% traffic on FERMAT). Pulkit demoed PDP editing. Discussed move to $2,000/month flat via Stripe. Kar volunteered as beta tester for MCP and AI modules.
action_items: Send MCP connector link for Claude integration
Email Stripe link and new plan details when current contract expires
Monitor account data and keep Kar posted on performance

recent.title: Fermat x Little Saints
recent.summary: Customer check-in. Mia showed new mobile/desktop module visibility feature. Kar raised font inconsistency on AI Search pages. Discussed strategy for penetrating unbranded search terms against larger competitors (Kyo, Seed Lip). AI Search showing purchases - performing better than most brands.
action_items: Flag font issue on AI search page to product team
Review prompts Little Saints is being cited on most

recent.title: Fermat x Little Saints
recent.summary: Introductory call with CSM Mia. Kar described business (non-alc spirits/cocktails, 40+ demo, moderation positioning). 10 live funnels, $25-30K daily ad spend target. Excited about SMS channel and Apple Pay. Discussed session recording filters, sticky ATC button, cross-sell opportunities. Agreed on monthly recurring check-ins.

calls.analysis: Little Saints has had consistent engagement with 3 calls in the last 4 months, most recently on Apr 13 with Pulkit and Nidhi taking over the account. The brand is a power user with 90% of traffic on FERMAT and plans to expand from 12 to 20 funnels. Key concern is the move from annual to month-to-month contract tied to fundraising timing.

slack.analysis: No Slack MCP available for this refresh.

email.analysis: Active email communication around the renewal process. Pulkit initiated renewal outreach on Apr 7, followed up on Apr 9 with new capabilities pitch, and sent a post-call recap on Apr 14 after the transition call. The thread shows proactive CSM engagement and a smooth account handover from the previous CSM team.
